evidence_label: curated PubMed E-utilities benchmark refresh, not treatment advice
query: (beta-thalassemia OR thalassemia) AND (HBG1 OR HBG2 OR HBG promoter OR fetal hemoglobin) AND (CRISPR OR Cas12a OR base editing OR gene editing) AND 2026[pdat]

records.role: global clinical Cas12a HBG1/HBG2 promoter-editing benchmark
records.title: CRISPR-Cas12a Gene Editing of HBG1 and HBG2 Promoters to Treat beta-Thalassemia
Clinical application of base editing for treating beta-thalassaemia
New Gene Therapy Strategy for beta-Thalassemia

decision_use: These records raise the novelty bar for HbF-only or HBG promoter-editing claims. They do not establish patient-specific relevance or access.
